### Cool Stuff & Try This
**[ChatGPT's New Agent Books Real Appointments – Try Planning Your Day!]: Tom's Guide**  
ChatGPT Agent is an update to the popular AI chatbot (that's ChatGPT, which predicts and generates text like a super-smart autocomplete) that can now handle real-world tasks, like planning errands and even booking a haircut appointment for you. It's exciting because it shows AI moving from just answering questions to actually doing stuff in your life, like helping with school sched
sections.quick_bits:
### Quick Bits
**[AI Spots Animals to Save Wildlife]**  
Google's new open-source AI model called SpeciesNet can identify animals in photos, helping conservationists track endangered species and promote wildlife protection. This is so inspiring because it shows AI tackling real-world problems like saving the planet, which could spark ideas for your own eco-projects or science fair entries!  
Source: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/speciesnet-open-source-a
